name: context-doodle
description: An animated SVG blob that grows fatter as your Cline AI-coding session's context window fills up.

commands.title: Context Doodle: Open in Editor Area

contextDoodle.contextWindowMax.description: Model context-window size used to compute the fill ratio.

contextDoodle.pollIntervalMs.description: How often to re-read the watched extension's task file (ms).

contextDoodle.targetExtensionId.description: The extension whose ui_messages.json to watch. Cline, Roo Code (rooveterinaryinc.roo-cline), and Kilo (kilocode.kilo-code) share the same on-disk format.

contextDoodle.statusBar.enabled.description: Show the ambient status-bar blob (animated character + percent that turns amber/red as fill rises). Always visible — the one surface that needs no clicking.

contextDoodle.autoRevealSidebar.description: Reveal the Context Doodle sidebar view automatically when the extension activates.

contextDoodle.autoOpenPanel.description: Open the Context Doodle animated panel beside the active editor automatically when the extension activates. Drag/dock once and it stays visible while coding.
